title: Creating Your First Command
description: Learn how to make a basic command in a Minecraft plugin.

lessons.title: Command Basics
lessons.content:
# Creating Your First Command

In this lesson, you'll learn how to make a simple command in a Minecraft plugin.

## Step 1: Register the Command
Go to your `plugin.yml` file and add:

```yml
commands:
  hello:
    description: Says hello
```

## Step 2: Create the Command in Java

```java
public class HelloCommand implements CommandExecutor {

    @Override
    public boolean onCommand(CommandSender sender, Command command, String label, String[] args) {
        sender.sendMessage("Hello, world!");
        return true;
    }
}
```

## Step 3: Register in Main Class

```java
getCommand("hello").setExecutor(new HelloCommand());
```

## Step 4: Test It
Run your server and type `/hello` in chat.

You should see: Hello, world!

## Done 🎉
You've created your first command!

quiz.question: Where do you register a command?
